name: Codex Auto-Fix Workspace
description: Higher-trust: let Codex edit a repository on a schedule. Runs non-interactively with no approval prompts but stays inside the workspace-write sandbox; review the diff and logs before pushing.

parameters.label: Repository path
parameters.help: Absolute path to the local git repository.

parameters.label: Prompt
parameters.default: Fix straightforward lint, formatting, or test failures in this repository. Keep changes small and summarize every file changed.
parameters.help: The task Codex performs. It may edit files inside the repo. Avoid single quotes.

parameters.label: Summary file path
parameters.help: Where Codex writes the final summary.

parameters.label: Log file path
parameters.help: Where the full run stream is captured for review.
